compatible_devices.compatible_series: Any single-phase AC inline or duct fan (TRIAC phase-cut compatible) up to 4A
compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Systemair RVK 100/125/150 A1, Garden Highpro AC duct fans, BioGreen AC extraction fans
compatible_devices.notes: Manual stepless speed control via TRIAC phase-cut dimming; no thermostat or temperature automation. SPC series, 4A max, 220/230V 50Hz, IP20 (indoor only). NOT compatible with EC fans (which require 0-10V or PWM signal) or with brushless DC fans. AC induction and shaded-pole motors that support phase-cut speed control are required. Suitable for supply and extraction fan applications.
